contract_summary: Get-wrapper: acquires a reference on the profile identified by the fully qualified name `fqname` within the namespace of `base`. The returned profile pointer carries an additional reference that the caller must release with `aa_put_profile` when done. If the name includes a namespace prefix, a temporary reference is taken on that namespace and released after lookup. On failure (NULL return), no reference is transferred. The caller must check the return value.
